name: [GRIDHAND] Social Publishing Agent - Weekly content calendar → auto-post Monday–Friday

gridhand.description: Every Sunday evening, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to review the upcoming week's content calendar for a local barbershop, selecting a new social media post to auto-publish on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter each morning at 8am, Monday through Friday. The workflow seamlessly connects to the barbershop's Hootsuite account, ensuring consistent and engaging content is shared with customers, such as promotions, styling tips, and behind-the-scenes glimpses, all designed to drive foot traffic and bookings throughout the week. By automating their social media posting, the barbershop owner saves several hours each week and increases their online presence, attracting new customers and keeping existing ones informed and entertained.
